network.title: Can't reach the server
network.description: Check your internet connection and try again.

forbidden.title: Not allowed
forbidden.description: You don't have access to this. Contact your administrator if you think this is wrong.

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.description: The page or resource you were looking for doesn't exist.

validation.title: Check your inputs
validation.description: Some fields need attention before we can proceed.

rate_limited.title: Too many attempts
rate_limited.description: Please wait a moment and try again.

server.title: Something went wrong on our end
server.description: Please try again in a moment. (Ref: {{ref}})

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: Please try again. If it persists, contact support with reference {{ref}}.
